general_notes: UNDER CUT DOORS 3/4" UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTED.

AT TURNOVER, CONTRACTOR IS TO GIVE NOTICE FOR REKEY TO SKECHERS LOSS PREVENTION DEPT. CONTRACTOR IS TO SUPPLY ALL KEYS TO SPACE TO TENANT OR TENANT'S LOCKSMITH. CONTACT SKECHERS LOSS PREVENTION DEPT. FOR TURNOVER AND SECURITY REQUIREMENTS.
EXISTING HARDWARE TO REMAIN. REPLACE ALL DAMAGED, WORN OR MISSING HARDWARE AS NEEDED.
MAXIMUM FORCE TO OPERATE DOORS SHALL NOT EXCEED 8.5 LBS FOR EXTERIOR DOORS AND 5 LBS. FOR INTERIOR DOORS.

EXTERIOR DOORS (EXCEPT DOOR 101) ARE NOT TO HAVE A KEYED ENTRY, BOLT OR DOOR HANDLE ON OUTSIDE. AT EXISTING DOORS REMOVE ANY EXISTING ENTRY HARDWARE. SUPPLY COVER PLATE TO CONCEAL HOLES OR CORES. SUPPLY STRIKE COVER PLATE PER HARDWARE SCHEDULE. STORE ENTRY IS TO ONLY BE THROUGH FRONT DOOR.
DOORS SHALL BE OPERABLE FROM THE INSIDE WITHOUT THE USE OF A KEY OR ANY SPECIAL KNOWLEDGE.
HAND ACTIVATED DOOR OPENING HARDWARE TO BE MOUNTED 34" ABOVE FLOOR AND OPERATED WITH A SINGLE EFFORT BY LEVER TYPE HARDWARE.
ALIGNMENT OF DOOR HEADS AND OTHER CRITICAL ELEMENTS SHALL BE MAINTAINED AT A CONSTANT LEVELAND SHALL NOT FOLLOW VARIATIONS IN FLOOR PLANE.
GC TO VERIFY DOOR IS IN PROPER WORKING CONDITION & PROVIDE HARDWARE PER SCHEDULE.
CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE SIGN "THIS DOOR TO REMAIN UNLOCKED WHILE THIS SPACE IS OCCUPIED" PER IBC 1010.1.9.3
hardware_preamble: UNDER CUT DOORS 3/4" UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTED.
NOTE: EXISTING HARDWARE TO REMAIN. REPLACE ALL DAMAGED, WORN OR MISSING HARDWARE AS NEEDED.
MAXIMUM FORCE TO OPERATE DOORS SHALL NOT EXCEED 8.5 LBS FOR EXTERIOR DOORS AND 5 LBS. FOR INTERIOR DOORS.

EXTERIOR DOORS (EXCEPT DOOR 101) ARE NOT TO HAVE A KEYED ENTRY, BOLT OR DOOR HANDLE ON OUTSIDE. AT EXISTING DOORS REMOVE ANY EXISTING ENTRY HARDWARE. SUPPLY COVER PLATE TO CONCEAL HOLES OR CORES. SUPPLY STRIKE COVER PLATE PER HARDWARE SCHEDULE. STORE ENTRY IS TO ONLY BE THROUGH FRONT DOOR.
DOORS SHALL BE OPERABLE FROM THE INSIDE WITHOUT THE USE OF A KEY OR ANY SPECIAL KNOWLEDGE.
HAND ACTIVATED DOOR OPENING HARDWARE TO BE MOUNTED 34" ABOVE FLOOR AND OPERATED WITH A SINGLE EFFORT BY LEVER TYPE HARDWARE.
ALIGNMENT OF DOOR HEADS AND OTHER CRITICAL ELEMENTS SHALL BE MAINTAINED AT A CONSTANT LEVELAND SHALL NOT FOLLOW VARIATIONS IN FLOOR PLANE.
GC TO VERIFY DOOR IS IN PROPER WORKING CONDITION & PROVIDE HARDWARE PER SCHEDULE.
CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE SIGN "THIS DOOR TO REMAIN UNLOCKED WHILE THIS SPACE IS OCCUPIED" PER IBC 1010.1.9.3

LETTERS SHALL BE RAISED 1/32", UPPER CASE SANS SERIF TYPE AND SHALL BE ACCOMPANIED WITH CONTRACTED GRADE 2 BRAILLE. CONTRACTED GRADE 2 BRAILLE DOTS SHALL BE 1/10" ON CENTER IN EACH CELL. THERE SHALL BE 2/10" SPACE BETWEEN CELLS. DOTS SHALL BE RAISED A MINIMUM OF 1/40" ABOVE BACKGROUND. BRAILLE DOTS SHALL BE DOMED OR ROUNDED.
SIGN SHALL HAVE A MATTE FINISH WITH WHITE LETTERS ON A BLACK BACKGROUND.
TACTILE "EXIT" OR "EXIT ROUTE" SIGN PER PLAN
keying_notes: AT TURNOVER, CONTRACTOR IS TO GIVE NOTICE FOR REKEY TO SKECHERS LOSS PREVENTION DEPT. CONTRACTOR IS TO SUPPLY ALL KEYS TO SPACE TO TENANT OR TENANT'S LOCKSMITH. CONTACT SKECHERS LOSS PREVENTION DEPT. FOR TURNOVER AND SECURITY REQUIREMENTS.

EXTERIOR DOORS (EXCEPT DOOR 101) ARE NOT TO HAVE A KEYED ENTRY, BOLT OR DOOR HANDLE ON OUTSIDE. AT EXISTING DOORS REMOVE ANY EXISTING ENTRY HARDWARE. SUPPLY COVER PLATE TO CONCEAL HOLES OR CORES. SUPPLY STRIKE COVER PLATE PER HARDWARE SCHEDULE. STORE ENTRY IS TO ONLY BE THROUGH FRONT DOOR.
DOORS SHALL BE OPERABLE FROM THE INSIDE WITHOUT THE USE OF A KEY OR ANY SPECIAL KNOWLEDGE.
GC TO PROVIDE 1 -3 8", % PIN KSP 307-601-26D MORTISE HOUSING WITH ADAM RITE CAM (SATIN CHROME FINISH). SEE NOTE ON COVER SHEET REGARDING TURNOVER REQUIREMENTS.

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (5 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
10 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
8 hardware set(s) identified; 8 have a complete extracted item list.
10 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
12 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
